messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Move your React context(s) to a separate file.
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchSnapshots'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchSnapshots]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'userColor', 'userName', and 'userPhotoURL'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [roomName, userColor, userName, userPhotoURL]

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
